# The Rebel

*[Camus](../philosophers/camus.md) · 1951*

An essay in which [Camus](../philosophers/camus.md) extends [the absurd](../glossary/the-absurd.md) into a philosophy of revolt: to say no to the intolerable brings forth a value common to all men, "I rebel, therefore we are". He criticizes the revolutionary ideologies that sacrifice the living to History and pleads for a thought of limits and measure.
